runs.text: Bucket Crosswalk | Buckets map into overlapping scenarios by union; modular is entity-flagged and the residual stays outside broad SAM.

text_body.plain_text: Bucket Crosswalk | Buckets map into overlapping scenarios by union; modular is entity-flagged and the residual stays outside broad SAM.

runs.text: entity-flagged module-assembly work, specific module assemblers identified in the registry, not a bucket union; it is not a column here.

text_body.plain_text: Modular: entity-flagged module-assembly work, specific module assemblers identified in the registry, not a bucket union; it is not a column here.

runs.text: Scenario membership is a union rule, not an additive math rule.
Broad includes all seven named buckets; metal, HM&E, and electrical are overlapping cuts that should not be summed across columns.

text_body.plain_text:
Scenario membership is a union rule, not an additive math rule.
Broad includes all seven named buckets; metal, HM&E, and electrical are overlapping cuts that should not be summed across columns.

runs.text: Residual stays in TAM until evidence assigns it.
Residual maps to no scenario, which prevents broad SAM from automatically equaling total TAM.

text_body.plain_text:
Residual stays in TAM until evidence assigns it.
Residual maps to no scenario, which prevents broad SAM from automatically equaling total TAM.

runs.text: Scot Forge (castings/forgings), DC Fabricators (structural/pre-outfit), Curtiss-Wright Electro-Mechanical and Leonardo DRS Naval Power (electrical/power).

text_body.plain_text: Example suppliers by bucket (illustrative): Scot Forge (castings/forgings), DC Fabricators (structural/pre-outfit), Curtiss-Wright Electro-Mechanical and Leonardo DRS Naval Power (electrical/power).

runs.text: (1) exclusion role; (2) operating-entity registry, SAM-resolved; (3) NAICS-4 bucket fallback; (4) service-NAICS exclusion; (5) residual. Description keywords are a QA sensitivity, not the classifier.

text_body.plain_text: Recommended classification order: (1) exclusion role; (2) operating-entity registry, SAM-resolved; (3) NAICS-4 bucket fallback; (4) service-NAICS exclusion; (5) residual. Description keywords are a QA sensitivity, not the classifier.

runs.text: Sources: (1) operating-entity supplier registry and the SAM bucket-to-scenario crosswalk; (2) FFATA/FSRS subaward records, DDG and submarine; (3) NAICS-4 bucket classification standard
